item.title: Trying to read the Blue Book #ga2021 #BlueBook
item.description: I trying to read all the Blue book for the virtual General Assembly of the Church of Scotland, on my blog “Reading the Blue Book 2021 edition”. Feel free to have a look https://readingthebluebook.wordpress.com #ga2021 #BlueBook N.B. they left it late to publish the Blue Book so I may not get it all done. #cliffhanger
